documentation.readme: > [!IMPORTANT] > This repository has been archived and is no longer maintained. > > Check out github.com/vigolium/vigolium — a brand new scanner that I made that's better in every way.
usage_sections: Installation: Download precompiled version here. If you have a Go environment, make sure you have Go >= 1.17 with Go Modules enable and run the following command. Please visit the Official Documention for more details.

arguments.name: --target
arguments.description: Target host, IP, MAC, or URL the tool operates on.

arguments.name: --output
arguments.description: Output file path for the report or capture.

arguments.name: --version
arguments.description: Print the tool version and exit.

arguments.name: --wordlist
arguments.description: Path to a wordlist (users, passwords, paths).

arguments.name: --dry-run
arguments.description: Print what would be done without making any changes.

arguments.name: --force
arguments.description: Force the action even if a safety check would block it.

function_signatures.name: main
function_signatures.description: Top-level entry point for jaeles (jaeles-project/jaeles). Reads CLI args, dispatches to subcommands.

function_signatures.name: run
function_signatures.description: Top-level CLI runner for jaeles. Returns a result envelope (ok, data, error).

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with zynon/LdapRelayScan (score=9); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with zodiacon/HookHunter (score=9); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with zmap/zmap (score=9); pair in the chain planner.
Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 4: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 5: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: > [!IMPORTANT] > This repository has been archived and is no longer maintained. > > Check out github.com/vigolium/vigolium — a brand new scanner that I made that's better in every way.
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: go install github.com/jaeles-project/jaeles@latest; docker run j3ssie/jaeles scan -s '<selector>' -u http://example.com. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `go install github.com/jaeles-project/jaeles@latest`. Further invocations from upstream: `jaeles scan -s <signature> -u <url>`; `jaeles scan -c 50 -s <signature> -U <list_urls> -L <level-of-signatures>`. > [!IMPORTANT] > This repository has been archived and is no longer maintained. > > Check out github.com/vigolium/vigolium — a brand new scanner that I made that's better in every way.

name: jaeles
summary: > [!IMPORTANT] > This repository has been archived and is no longer maintained. > > Check out github.com/vigolium/vigolium — a brand new scanner that I made that's better in every way.

trust.warning: Attribution / index entry only. The operator must audit the code, the README, the license, and the releases before invoking. Phase 5 — entry is auto-generated from the operator's curated fetch list; no automated enrichment yet.

use_cases: When you need web, use jaeles because > [!IMPORTANT] > This repository has been archived and is no longer maintained. > > Check out github.com/vigolium/vigolium — a brand new scanner that I made tha.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `go install github.com/jaeles-project/jaeles@latest` as documented upstream for jaeles.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `jaeles scan -s <signature> -u <url>` as documented upstream for jaeles.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `jaeles scan -c 50 -s <signature> -U <list_urls> -L <level-of-signatures>` as documented upstream for jaeles.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `jaeles scan -c 50 -s <signature> -U <list_urls>` as documented upstream for jaeles.
When chaining web tools, pair jaeles with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `jaeles --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
